action_set_definitions.name: get_vessel_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves vessel metadata including current GM (metacentric height), maintenance zones, and coordinates of active reefer motor intakes.

action_set_definitions.name: get_ballast_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the vessel's ballast tanks, including current levels and max capacities to assist in stability adjustments.

action_set_definitions.name: get_dock_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all containers at the dock awaiting loading, including their ID, weight, IMDG class, and flammability status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_cargo_hold_map
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the layout of the ship's cargo hold, specifying occupancy, in-transit status, and physical (X, Y, Z) coordinates for every slot.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_vessel_ballast
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the level of a specific ballast tank to change the ship's center of gravity and improve metacentric height (GM).

tank_id.description: ID of the ballast tank to adjust.

target_level_tons.description: The desired level of ballast in tons.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_stowage_plan
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates a loading action. Returns 'is_valid' as true ONLY if the resulting GM is strictly > 1.55m and all segregation/maintenance rules are met.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_loading_operation
action_set_definitions.description: Permanently loads a container from the dock into a ship slot and updates the environment state.

state_description.current_status: Real-time metrics of the ship's condition
state_description.cargo_hold_map: A representation of the ship's bays and slots and their current occupancy
state_description.dock_inventory: List of cargo items currently at the port waiting to be loaded
